ddls:
CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the police agency */,
  "agency_type" TEXT /* Type of agency (e.g., city police, county sheriff) */,
  "agency_location" TEXT /* Location of the agency (city, county) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the agency */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drug_arrest_disparities" (
  "disparity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disparity record */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agency reporting the data */,
  "black_drug_arrest_disparity" REAL /* Disparity score for black drug arrests */,
  "black_drug_arrest_z_score" REAL /* Z-score for black drug arrests */,
  "hispanic_drug_arrest_disparity" REAL /* Disparity score for Hispanic drug arrests */,
  "hispanic_drug_arrest_z_score" REAL /* Z-score for Hispanic drug arrests */,
  "pct_of_black_pop_arrested_drugs" REAL /* Percentage of black population arrested for drugs */,
  "pct_of_hispanic_pop_arrested_drugs" REAL /* Percentage of Hispanic population arrested for drugs */,
  "pct_of_white_pop_arrested_drugs" REAL /* Percentage of white population arrested for drugs */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the data */,
  "city_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the city/county */,
  "total_arrests" INTEGER /* Total number of arrests in the agency */,
  "total_drug_arrests" INTEGER /* Total number of drug-related arrests in the agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disparity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_arrest_disparities_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disparity_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score record */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agency associated with the score */,
  "max_drug_arrest_disparity_score" REAL /* Maximum drug arrest disparity score for the agency */,
  "max_drug_arrest_disparity_score_percentile" REAL /* Percentile ranking of the maximum disparity score */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the data */,
  "total_arrests" INTEGER /* Total number of arrests in the agency */,
  "total_drug_arrests" INTEGER /* Total number of drug-related arrests in the agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disparity_scores_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnic_groups" (
  "ethnic_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnic group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the ethnic group (e.g., Black, Hispanic, White) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnic_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "arrest_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agency related to the statistics */,
  "ethnic_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ethnic group associated with the arrests */,
  "total_arrests" INTEGER /* Total number of arrests in the agency */,
  "drug_arrests" INTEGER /* Total number of drug-related arrests in the agency */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the data */,
  "city_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the city/county */,
  "population_of_ethnic_group" INTEGER /* Population of the specific ethnic group in the city/county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_arrest_statistics_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_arrest_statistics_ethnic_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("ethnic_group_id") REFERENCES ethnic_groups ("ethnic_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agency the report is based upon */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the key findings in the report */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the report */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file (if stored) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access attempt */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the platform */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., agency reports) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., API, database) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp of the data source */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the data source (0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
